## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (regression, incorrect output, broken test)
- [ ] Regulation correction (wrong article, wrong deadline, misquoted text)
- [ ] New feature (new tool, new resource, new prompt)
- [ ] Refactor or internal cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only

## Regulation reference

If this PR touches the knowledge layer, cite the article(s) of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 it relies on.

## Testing

- [ ] I have added or updated tests in `test.mjs`
- [ ] All 109+ tests pass locally (`node test.mjs`)
- [ ] I have built the project (`npm run build`) without errors

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce LLM calls into the deterministic knowledge layer
- [ ] I have updated the README or CHANGELOG if user-visible behavior changed
